bullets: 31 house church believers in China sentenced to prison terms under religious restrictions, including an elderly man, following coordinated prosecutions documented by ChinaAid.
Christian minority community in India facing arrests and criminal charges under anti-conversion laws for attending a prayer gathering across state lines.
Civilians in Lebanon—including displaced families in southern suburbs of Beirut with nowhere to shelter—amid intensifying airstrikes, advancing ground forces, and worsening displacement
Civilians in Gaza facing ongoing airstrikes during holiday periods, with dozens killed and wounded in crowded public spaces and near medical facilities

Populations across the Middle East—including civilians in Kuwait, Iraq, and Gulf states—caught in escalating military exchanges between the United States and Iran, with missile and drone strikes reaching multiple countries
Military personnel and civilians across at least eight Middle Eastern countries where US facilities have sustained damage amid prolonged US-Iran conflict now in its ninety-fourth day
Residents of eastern Ukraine enduring relentless nightly missile and drone bombardments, with children continuing education in underground shelters
Civilians in Romania near the Ukrainian border following a drone strike on a major port city, raising fears of the conflict spreading to NATO territory
Opposition members and civil society voices in Mozambique facing politically motivated killings and violence amid a disputed political climate, with dozens reported killed
Families of Afghan refugees killed and dozens more injured when a vehicle carrying returned refugees overturned on a dangerous road in eastern Afghanistan
Residents of Paris and communities across France injured and bereaved amid violent post-match riots that left hundreds arrested, officers wounded, and one person dead
Thousands of civilians in Peru amid deep social divisions and street protests surrounding a highly polarizing presidential election campaign
Two patients in Brazil under medical watch as a deadly Ebola outbreak spreads beyond Africa for the first time
Communities across DR Congo and neighboring Uganda enduring a rapidly worsening Ebola outbreak with over 1,000 suspected cases and hundreds of deaths
Two men still trapped deep inside a narrow flooded cave in Laos after days of failed rescue attempts
Millions of residents across Japan exposed to dangerous winds and heavy rain from a powerful typhoon
Coastal communities in Chile shaken by a magnitude 6 earthquake with widespread reports of strong ground movement
Residents near an active volcano in Indonesia living under ongoing eruption threat and exclusion zone restrictions
Stranded farmers and cut-off communities in eastern Syria following severe Euphrates River flooding and bridge collapse
Farming families across Australia facing catastrophic crop losses from a mouse plague described as worse than any in recent memory
